title: Sankt Pölten, Lower Austria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sankt Pölten, Lower Austria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sankt Pölten is a city in Lower Austria with a population of 55,514. The capital of Lower Austria, a historic city with a Baroque cathedral, modern government district, and a strategic location between Vienna and Linz.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
